mapper.sql: id, project_name, name, planned_start, planned_end, actual_start, actual_end, progress, status, note, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_phase WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName}) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_phase (project_name, name, planned_start, planned_end, actual_start, actual_end, progress, status, note, sort_order) VALUES (#{projectName}, #{name}, #{plannedStart}, #{plannedEnd}, #{actualStart}, #{actualEnd}, #{progress}, #{status}, #{note}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_phase SET name = #{name}, planned_start = #{plannedStart}, planned_end = #{plannedEnd}, actual_start = #{actualStart}, actual_end = #{actualEnd}, progress = #{progress}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM project_phase WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName})
